<div class="titleCont hasSideNav"><div class="page-title"><div class="title"><h1>PCS Ranking</h1> </div><span class="arrow">»</span><div class="subtitle"><h2>Teams</h2></div></div><a class="toggleSideMenu" href="">menu</a></div>
<div class="desktop-ad leaderbord general"></div><div class="mob-ad leaderbord general"></div><div class="top-cont"></div><div class="top-cont-mobile top-cont-mobile-other"></div>
<div class="page-content ">
<div class=""><div class="">
<div class="fs14">Summation of points from the 100 best top-30 results over a 12-month period plus 2 weeks overlap. Races are counted once. After the finish of a stage, the corresponding stage of the previous edition is excluded. The limit of 100 races ensures that quality results weight heavier than accumulating smaller results. Also, this gives a more level playing field for teams with less riders on the team.</div>
</div>
<div class="mt10">

<input type="hidden" name="s" value="">
